content:
Travel Road: Sevilla [Alsa Bus]-> Granada [Airbus] -> Barcelona Vocation Day 1 Sevilla
New Indian Museum Royal Palace of Seville Plaza Espanya Day 2 Sevilla
Cathedral of Seville Day 3 Granada
The Abraham Palace Day 4 Barcelona
See the Sea Day 5 Barcelona
Visit Casa Batlló and Casa Milano Sagrada Familia
title: TripSpain

content: “While I frequently face confusion over which path to choose, I am certain that the determination to do my best lies within me.”
